case_title: JESUS ZAPANTA VS. COTE SUD RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAPANTA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTE SUD RESTAURANT ARBELBIDE, RAYMOND $62.15 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $62.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2009 BY JOHN DEARMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
